summary:
GEOPOLITICAL PROPHECIES AND LEADERSHIP: Brandon prays fervently for political figures and international shifts, claiming divine foresight regarding global leadership. He prophesies the imminent fall of current regimes in Cuba, Mexico, and North Korea, specifically naming the end of Kim Jong-un's era and Claudia Scheinbaum's influence. Brandon foresees a massive spiritual awakening in Iran driven by the underground church, alongside a sweeping revival across South Korea, Japan, Taiwan, and broader Asia. He also petitions for the spiritual conversion of Elon Musk and the Trump family, asking for divine guidance and protection over Donald Trump, his sons, and his extended family as they navigate upcoming challenges. Furthermore, Brandon describes a vision of a red and white flannel blanket over Taiwan, representing divine protection and hidden intelligence uncovering underground bases and foreign plots.

DOMESTIC TERRORISM AND INFRASTRUCTURE THREATS: Brandon recounts recurring visions of strategic, fatal attacks planned against the United States by foreign adversaries using covert, outdated communication methods. He describes seeing fiber optic cables connected to old-school rotary telephones extending into Mississippi, Alabama, Georgia, and Florida, signifying terrorists operating below the radar to avoid federal detection. Brandon recalls a previous vision involving Arab men poisoning the water supply in southern states, leading to mass casualties, giant communal graves marked with an eagle memorial, and severe water shortages. He also warns of a cyberattack that will plunge cities into darkness for weeks or months, alongside a secret North Korean barge on the Mississippi River disguised to launch a Soviet-era EMP rocket over Tennessee and Kentucky.

GLOBAL CONFLICTS AND MILITARY ESCALATIONS: Brandon warns of impending military escalations in Europe and the Middle East, specifically highlighting war games involving Russia. He claims that the tactics the United States used to assist Ukraine will be mirrored by Russia to aid Iran on a massive scale, potentially putting American troops in direct harm. Brandon foresees North Korea stepping in as a strategic ally to secure oil rights, further backing adversarial maneuvers. He urgently calls for prayer to de-escalate tensions and protect American intelligence officers and whistleblowers who are working to uncover hidden biological weapons, drones, and underground bunkers used by foreign enemies. He also mentions an ominous tan scorpion emerging from the Gulf of Mexico toward Tennessee and a suspicious African cartel boat approaching the coast.

RELIGIOUS REVIVAL AND VATICAN UPHEAVAL: Brandon predicts a massive shaking within the Catholic Church, which he claims is currently losing its relevance among the younger generation. He describes a future event that will physically crack the walls of the Vatican. However, Brandon prophesies that this catastrophic event will serve as a catalyst for a great spiritual revival, sparking a massive influx of young people returning to the church in Europe and South America, complete with miraculous healings and a renewed manifestation of divine glory.

THE LIBERATION AND ECONOMIC REBIRTH OF CUBA: Brandon shares a vivid prophecy detailing the imminent liberation of Cuba, which he claims will soon experience a dark and disruptive event followed by profound transformation. He foresees the removal of the ruling dictator's bloodline and the rise of a new leader, assisted by political figures like Marco Rubio, who will guide the nation into an era of unprecedented economic growth. Brandon envisions a glowing around the island, signifying divine intervention and a renewed trade relationship with the United States. This economic rebirth is highlighted by visions of Cuban cigars with yellow bands and American-made vehicles, specifically Ford F-150s, GMCs, and Chevrolets, being exported to the newly liberated nation.
